heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 190111 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)19011136:232., .June 30, 1950, ch. 431, § 1264 Stat. 314
